name: E-Commerce Full-Stack Website
description: Built with React.js, Redux, and Node.js. Users can add products to cart, view cart contents, and update quantities.

name: Web Scraping and Automation
description: Built a flexible scraping and data extraction system with Node.js, Express, and Python requests, designed for easy site adaptation.

name: Online Compiler Service
description: Built a browser-based code compiler service using Node.js to compile and run programs directly in the web interface.

name: Real-Time Live Chat
description: Built a real-time chat app with Socket.IO and Node.js including direct peer-to-peer file sharing for lower server load.

name: Video Streaming Platform
description: Built with Next.js SSR and Spring Boot with PostgreSQL, plus analytics and SEO improvements for better discoverability.

name: SwipeMatch Dating App
description: Built with MERN and Tailwind CSS featuring secure auth, swipe flows, real-time chat, and Redux state management.
